title: Zero to Hero AI — The Complete ML Knowledge Architecture
description: A comprehensive, pedagogically-ordered curriculum covering Python, Mathematics, ML, Deep Learning, NLP, LLMs, and Production Systems. v7.0: Deep chapter-level review — stripped artifacts, merged duplicates, cleaned misplaced content, consolidated LLM topics.
source_books: Stage 1: Math & Foundations Master (1539 pages, 17 chapters)
Stage 2: Core ML Master (2695 pages, 18 chapters)
Stage 3: Deep Learning Master (2126 pages, 15 chapters)
Stage 4: NLP & LLMs Master (1076 pages, 19 chapters)
Stage 5: ML Systems & Production Master (3223 pages, 24 chapters)

enrichment_note: Enriched with 1653 concepts from 26 open-access books

parts.title: Foundations
parts.intro: Programming, mathematics, data literacy, and core ML concepts.

parts.title: Classical Machine Learning
parts.intro: The supervised and unsupervised algorithms that power most of production ML.

parts.title: Deep Learning
parts.intro: From neurons to transformers — the architectures reshaping AI.

parts.title: Language & LLMs
parts.intro: Natural language processing and the large language model revolution.

parts.title: Production Systems
parts.intro: Taking ML from notebooks to reliable, scalable production systems.

parts.title: Probabilistic & Generative AI
parts.intro: Modeling uncertainty and generating new data — the mathematical heart of modern AI.

parts.title: Advanced Topics
parts.intro: Research frontiers, learning theory, and pushing the boundaries of what's possible.

parts.title: Responsible AI
parts.intro: Ethics, fairness, privacy, and the societal impact of AI systems.
